modeNames.standardSubtitle: AOA (Asset Oriented Abstraction) optimizes traditional ERC-4337 by eliminating off-chain signature servers and on-chain verify cost.
modeNames.superSubtitle: Based on AOA, supports custom gas token and no individual contract deployment needed.
